Okabe-Ito colour palette

Source: R/scale_okabeito.R
palette_okabeito.Rd

Palette generator for the Okabe-Ito colours, for use with ggplot2 scales. Vendored from the see package.

Usage

palette_okabeito(palette = "full", reverse = FALSE, order = 1:9)

Arguments

palette

One of "full", "black_first", "full_original" or "black_original".

reverse

Reverse the colour order.

order

Integer vector (within 1:9) selecting and reordering colours.

Value

A function that returns n hex colours.

On this page
